entries.name: onboard-agent
entries.description: Use when a fresh coding agent needs akm installed, wired in, and validated end to end.

entries.name: publish-stash
entries.description: Use when a local stash is ready to publish and verify with current akm v0.7.0 conventions.

entries.name: harvest-session-knowledge
